azure_ai_search.vector_profile: HNSW cosine over CLIP text embeddings plus keyword search

foundry_models.image_generation_status: MAI-Image-2.5-Flash was not newly deployed in South Central US because quota is fully used: current 2, limit 2.

vm_run.result: Online-only cases retrieved from Azure AI Search were synced into a local SQLite delta store and then found again from offline search.

rows.query: A site photo shows concrete honeycombing and exposed aggregate after column formwork removal.
rows.interpretation: The local seed pack is sufficient; no online-only delta is required.

rows.scenario: Water ingress upgraded by electrical risk
rows.query: Water seepage is close to a temporary electrical riser in the basement after heavy rain.
rows.interpretation: Online retrieval upgrades a generic waterproofing case into a critical electrical-safety case and caches it offline.

rows.query: A temporary works prop is bowed and the base plate appears displaced after slab loading.
rows.interpretation: The offline seed pack has no temporary-works case; AI Search finds the enriched online case and the delta store retains it.

rows.scenario: Confined space safety case missing offline
rows.query: A gas detector alarms during manhole drainage inspection before confined space entry.
rows.interpretation: Online retrieval fills a confined-space safety gap and preserves the case for future disconnected searches.
